title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for Tyler Technologies (TYL), evaluating its intrinsic value based on strong, predictable public sector cash flows.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 10.0% over next 10 years, combining organic growth and strategic acquisitions.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.5% anticipating long-term sustained municipal spending growth.
assumptions.discountRate: 8.0% reflecting low volatility and stable cash flows.
